title: aegilops crassa var. typica
intro: Aegilops crassa var. typica, also known as the spelt wheat or goat's wheat, is a type of wild grass in the wheat family (Poaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a potential remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Aegilops crassa var. typica include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
